query:
INSERT INTO ciphertexts_branch (
            handle,
            ciphertext,
            ciphertext_version,
            ciphertext_type,
            producer_block_hash,
            block_number
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, ''::bytea, NULL)
        ON CONFLICT (handle, ciphertext_version, producer_block_hash) DO NOTHING
